metadata.title: KensaraAI SEO Topic Cluster Map
metadata.description: 5 pillar topic clusters mapping KensaraAI's target keywords to pillar pages and supporting cluster content. Built for India-focused DPDPA/GDPR compliance searches.
metadata.target_market: India — Enterprise DPOs, CISOs, Legal Counsels, Founders in regulated sectors
metadata.strategy: Each pillar page is a comprehensive 2500-4000 word guide. Cluster pages are 800-1200 word posts linking back to pillar. Internal linking creates topical authority.
